g.text: Requirements -> Core Entities -> APIs -> HLD -> Deep Dives

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 1. User should be able to view all the chats

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 2. User should be able to send messages in a chat

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 3. User should be able to receive messages in a chat

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 4. User should be able to send media in a chat

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 5. User should be able to receive media in a chat

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 6. User should be able to receive all the unread messages when coming online
